title: My First Day at the Soup Kitchen

all.en: I signed up to volunteer at the downtown soup kitchen every Saturday morning.
all.zh: 我報名每週六上午到市中心的愛心廚房當志工。

all.en: On my first day, the coordinator gave me a clean apron and a hairnet.
all.zh: 第一天，協調員給了我一條乾淨的圍裙和一頂髮網。

all.en: She explained that we would serve hot meals to about two hundred people.
all.zh: 她向我解釋我們將為大約兩百人提供熱食。

all.en: My job was to scoop rice and vegetables onto each plastic tray.
all.zh: 我的工作是把飯和青菜舀到每個塑膠餐盤上。

all.en: At first, I felt nervous and worried about making mistakes in front of others.
all.zh: 起初我很緊張，擔心會當著大家的面出錯。

all.en: However, the regular volunteers were friendly and quickly showed me what to do.
all.zh: 不過，常駐的志工們都很友善，很快就指導我該怎麼做。

all.en: The guests were polite, and many of them thanked us with warm smiles.
all.zh: 用餐的客人都很有禮貌，許多人帶著溫暖的笑容向我們道謝。

all.en: One older man told me he had been coming here for almost five years.
all.zh: 一位年長的男士告訴我，他來這裡已經將近五年了。

all.en: He said the meals helped him save enough money for his medicine.
all.zh: 他說這裡的餐點讓他存下了足夠的藥錢。

all.en: By the end of the shift, my back ached, but my heart felt lighter.
all.zh: 輪班結束時，我背很痠，但內心卻無比輕盈。

all.en: I promised to return every weekend for as long as I possibly could.
all.zh: 我答應自己只要能做到，每個週末都會回來。
